old_value:
{"id":"lc-z4u","title":"Plan: Website feature parity + Discourse integration","description":"Planning phase for full website feature parity with mobile app + deep Discourse integration as location-based forums. Create .specs/plan.md with:

PROJECT CONTEXT:
- lilypad-chat-backend: NestJS + PostgreSQL/PostGIS + Redis + CometChat + Mapbox
- lilypad-chat-mobile: React Native, full-featured (map, group chats, friends, places, destinations, geocaching, privacy, rich messages, WebSocket)
- lilypad-chat-website: Next.js 14, currently limited (1-to-1 chat, regional chat with polling, basic profile, placeholder map)
- discourse: Vanilla Discourse with SSO, connected via ForumGateway adapter

FEATURE PARITY SCOPE (mobile → web):
1. Live map with user locations (Mapbox + WebSocket, replacing placeholder)
2. Group chats (create, manage, roles, permissions, banning)
3. Friends system (add, favorites, requests, suggestions)
4. Places (create, check-in, gallery, map view)
5. Destinations/trips (create, follow, arrive tracking)
6. Geocaching integration (browse, search, share to chat)
7. Privacy controls (invisibility, private location zones, granular visibility)
8. Rich messages (photos, places, geocaches, destinations in chat)
9. WebSocket upgrade (replace 5s polling with real-time Socket.IO)
10. User blocking (block/unblock, system blocks)
11. Push notifications (web push via service worker)
12. Message reactions, typing indicators, read receipts
13. Chat filtering (all, direct, groups, regional, topics)
14. User search and discovery

DISCOURSE INTEGRATION SCOPE:
1. Auto-create Discourse categories per region (from WOF location hierarchy)
2. Embed forum threads/topics inline on website dashboard
3. SSO with location context (pass user region to Discourse)
4. Location-aware topic suggestions on dashboard
5. Unread counts and activity indicators from Discourse API
6. Deep link from chat to related forum topics

PLANNING REQUIREMENTS:
- Feature list numbered 00, 01, 02... grouped by milestone
- Dependency graph showing what blocks what
- Complexity score (1-5) for overall project
- Tech stack decisions (WebSocket strategy, Discourse embed approach, map implementation)
- Consider: backend already supports most features via API, focus is on web frontend consumption
- Consider: CometChat SDK already integrated on web for 1-to-1, extend for group chat
- Consider: Mapbox already available in mobile, needs web GL integration
- Write plan to .specs/plan.md","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremy@theirish.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T23:49:41Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-03T23:49:41Z"}

Planning phase for full website feature parity with mobile app + deep Discourse integration as location-based forums. Create .specs/plan.md with:

PROJECT CONTEXT:
- lilypad-chat-backend: NestJS + PostgreSQL/PostGIS + Redis + CometChat + Mapbox
- lilypad-chat-mobile: React Native, full-featured (map, group chats, friends, places, destinations, geocaching, privacy, rich messages, WebSocket)
- lilypad-chat-website: Next.js 14, currently limited (1-to-1 chat, regional chat with polling, basic profile, placeholder map)
- discourse: Vanilla Discourse with SSO, connected via ForumGateway adapter

FEATURE PARITY SCOPE (mobile → web):
1. Live map with user locations (Mapbox + WebSocket, replacing placeholder)
2. Group chats (create, manage, roles, permissions, banning)
3. Friends system (add, favorites, requests, suggestions)
4. Places (create, check-in, gallery, map view)
5. Destinations/trips (create, follow, arrive tracking)
6. Geocaching integration (browse, search, share to chat)
7. Privacy controls (invisibility, private location zones, granular visibility)
8. Rich messages (photos, places, geocaches, destinations in chat)
9. WebSocket upgrade (replace 5s polling with real-time Socket.IO)
10. User blocking (block/unblock, system blocks)
11. Push notifications (web push via service worker)
12. Message reactions, typing indicators, read receipts
13. Chat filtering (all, direct, groups, regional, topics)
14. User search and discovery

DISCOURSE INTEGRATION SCOPE:
1. Auto-create Discourse categories per region (from WOF location hierarchy)
2. Embed forum threads/topics inline on website dashboard
3. SSO with location context (pass user region to Discourse)
4. Location-aware topic suggestions on dashboard
5. Unread counts and activity indicators from Discourse API
6. Deep link from chat to related forum topics

PLANNING REQUIREMENTS:
- Feature list numbered 00, 01, 02... grouped by milestone
- Dependency graph showing what blocks what
- Complexity score (1-5) for overall project
- Tech stack decisions (WebSocket strategy, Discourse embed approach, map implementation)
- Consider: backend already supports most features via API, focus is on web frontend consumption
- Consider: CometChat SDK already integrated on web for 1-to-1, extend for group chat
- Consider: Mapbox already available in mobile, needs web GL integration
- Write plan to .specs/plan.md"}

new_value: {"notes":"Plan created at .specs/plan.md. 28 features across 6 milestones. Complexity 4/5. Key decisions: Socket.IO (matching backend), Mapbox GL JS (matching mobile), Zustand+React Query (state), CometChat group extension (chat), server-rendered Discourse via ForumGateway (no iframes). Critical path: Foundation → Chat → Social/Map/Discourse in parallel."}
